value.found_quote: These models are optimized for browsing and data analysis, and can use web search, remote MCP servers, and file search over internal vector stores to generate detailed reports
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that the deep research models (o3-deep-research and o4-mini-deep-research) support file search over internal vector stores, which directly matches the claim. The page also provides working code examples demonstrating the "file_search" tool with "vector_store_ids", confirming the feature is actively available via the Responses API. No preview or deprecated language is used for this feature.
